raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.3,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.7,"R1.4":1.0,"R1.5":0.3,"R1.6":0.7,"R1.7":0.3,"RX.1":0.7,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":0.7,"RX.4":0.7,"RX.5":0.3},"active_set":["R1.2","R1.3","R1.4","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"rationale":{"R1.2":"Logical consistency is a central responsibility in providing thoughts on the coherence of the draft's argument chain.","R1.3":"Evidence-claim alignment is central to evaluating whether the reported results support the draft's conclusions.","R1.4":"Novelty assessment is load-bearing as the draft claims to introduce a first-of-its-kind application, making it essential to any opinion.","R1.6":"Writing polish is central for feedback on the draft's sentence-level clarity, flow, and conciseness.","RX.1":"Uncertainty disclosure is central to reviewing how the draft handles ambiguities like abstention rates and knowledge claims.","RX.2":"Overclaim avoidance is load-bearing given the draft's assertive statements on improvements and departures from prior work.","RX.3":"Scope adherence is central to ensure feedback remains focused on the log-based anomaly detection context.","RX.4":"Downstream-harm avoidance is central due to potential risks in applying the framework to real-world industrial systems.","RX.5":"Provenance and traceability is peripheral as the draft references datasets and baselines without detailed citations."}}

rationale.R1.2: Logical consistency is a central responsibility in providing thoughts on the coherence of the draft's argument chain.
rationale.R1.3: Evidence-claim alignment is central to evaluating whether the reported results support the draft's conclusions.
rationale.R1.4: Novelty assessment is load-bearing as the draft claims to introduce a first-of-its-kind application, making it essential to any opinion.
rationale.R1.6: Writing polish is central for feedback on the draft's sentence-level clarity, flow, and conciseness.
rationale.RX.1: Uncertainty disclosure is central to reviewing how the draft handles ambiguities like abstention rates and knowledge claims.
rationale.RX.2: Overclaim avoidance is load-bearing given the draft's assertive statements on improvements and departures from prior work.
rationale.RX.3: Scope adherence is central to ensure feedback remains focused on the log-based anomaly detection context.
rationale.RX.4: Downstream-harm avoidance is central due to potential risks in applying the framework to real-world industrial systems.
rationale.RX.5: Provenance and traceability is peripheral as the draft references datasets and baselines without detailed citations.
